build_system: pnpm + turborepo, composite TypeScript project references. Root tsconfig has noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess. All packages use 'type': 'module'.
test_framework: vitest (run mode). Tests live in src/__tests__/ for packages, adjacent to source with .test.ts suffix.
build_command: pnpm build (runs turbo build across 51 packages)
test_command: pnpm test (runs turbo test across 75 packages)
verification_instructions: 1) pnpm typecheck (must pass 72/72), 2) pnpm build (must pass 51/51), 3) pnpm test (must pass 75/75), 4) pnpm lint (must pass 61/61)
setup_instructions: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile in the workspace root
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Node.js 22 available. No Docker daemon needed for validation - use host-based TypeScript compilation and vitest.
contribution_requirements: All gates must pass. Strict TS required. No fake completion signals. Code must actually build and test. No weakening of global strictness.
key_patterns: 1) Package barrel exports from src/index.ts. 2) Zod schemas for validation. 3) Interface-first design with in-memory fallbacks. 4) Service classes with constructor DI. 5) Pino logger. 6) Redis/NATS/BullMQ for distributed infra with graceful no-op when unconfigured. 7) Tests use vitest describe/it/expect with beforeEach setup.
directory_structure: apps/ (13 Next.js apps), services/ (17 backend services), packages/ (37 shared packages). Key packages for this task: realtime, notifications, queue, data-plane, sync-engine. Key services: ws-gateway, cdc-relay.
